description: Healthcare claim / denial row — modeled on the Denials RCM app data shape (CARC/RARC denial codes, NPI, CPT, ICD-10, claim amounts). Structural + format validation; denial-reasoning/appeal logic lives in the Denials application layer.

denial_code.pattern_message: CARC denial code expected, e.g. CO-16, PR-1, OA-23
denial_code.fix: Use a CARC code like CO-16, PR-1 or OA-23.

rarc_code.pattern_message: RARC remark code expected, e.g. M51, N130
rarc_code.fix: Use a RARC remark code like M51 or N130.

provider_npi.fix: Enter the 10-digit NPI exactly as registered.

icd10_code.pattern_message: ICD-10-CM code expected, e.g. J02.9, Z23
icd10_code.fix: Use an ICD-10-CM code like J02.9 or Z23.

modifier.pattern_message: CPT modifier is 2 alphanumeric chars, e.g. 25, 59, LT
modifier.fix: Use a 2-char CPT modifier like 25, 59 or LT.

billed_amount.pattern_message: billed_amount must be numeric with up to 2 decimals
billed_amount.fix: Numeric with up to 2 decimals - no currency symbols or words.

paid_amount.pattern_message: paid_amount must be numeric with up to 2 decimals
paid_amount.fix: Numeric with up to 2 decimals - no currency symbols or words.
